title: Synapse - Messaging Web App
description: A secure web messenger with email verification, JWT sessions, and role-based access. Access logic pushed into PostgreSQL (RLS + PL/pgSQL), reducing client-side complexity by 40%. Piloted with 10+ concurrent users and iterated on feedback to resolve RLS edge cases.

title: SpotiAnalyzer - Spotify Playlist Analyzer
description: A Next.js/React app using the Spotify Web API to profile playlists, artists, and genres. Processed 3,000+ tracks during testing. Implements OAuth 2.0, cursor-based pagination, and rate-limit retries with exponential backoff for large playlists.

title: Meal Dealer
description: Generated 500+ meal-deal combinations ranked by price and nutrition, saving users 8-12% per basket compared with random selections. Demoed to peers and professors with excellent feedback. Coordinated a 6-person GitHub workflow merging 20+ PRs per week.

title: Game of Life
description: An interactive implementation of Conway's Game of Life cellular automaton with customizable grid sizes and patterns.
